subcodes.first_line: Hájí Ahmad, upon him be My glory, through the assistance of God - exalted be His glory - having traversed land and sea, hath attained the Most Sacred Court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حاجی احمد علیه بهائی باعانت حق جل جلاله از سبیل بر و بحر گذشته بساحت امنع
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
